template:
test -f benchmarks/tests/fixtures/corpora/corpus-01-bam-mini/aligned/human_like_genotyping_candidate_panel.sam.bai && test -f benchmarks/tests/fixtures/corpora/corpus-01-bam-mini/reference/corpus_01_bam_reference.fasta && test -f benchmarks/tests/fixtures/corpora/corpus-01-bam-mini/variants/human_like_genotyping_candidate_sites.vcf && test -f benchmarks/tests/fixtures/corpora/corpus-01-bam-mini/regions/human_like_genotyping_target_regions.txt && angsd -i benchmarks/tests/fixtures/corpora/corpus-01-bam-mini/aligned/human_like_genotyping_candidate_panel.sam -sites benchmarks/tests/fixtures/corpora/corpus-01-bam-mini/variants/human_like_genotyping_candidate_sites.vcf -rf benchmarks/tests/fixtures/corpora/corpus-01-bam-mini/regions/human_like_genotyping_target_regions.txt -doGlf 2 -doMajorMinor 1 -doMaf 1 -out benchmarks/readiness/local-ready/bam.genotyping/genotyping && bcftools view benchmarks/readiness/local-ready/bam.genotyping/genotyping.bcf -Oz -o benchmarks/readiness/local-ready/bam.genotyping/genotyping.vcf.gz && tabix -f -p vcf benchmarks/readiness/local-ready/bam.genotyping/genotyping.vcf.gz && python - <<'PY' > benchmarks/readiness/local-ready/bam.genotyping/genotyping.gl.json
import json
print(json.dumps({"producer": "angsd", "gl_source": "benchmarks/readiness/local-ready/bam.genotyping/genotyping.glf.gz", "bcf_source": "benchmarks/readiness/local-ready/bam.genotyping/genotyping.bcf"}, indent=2))
PY && python - <<'PY' > benchmarks/readiness/local-ready/bam.genotyping/genotyping.summary.json
import json
print(json.dumps({"caller": "angsd", "reference": "benchmarks/tests/fixtures/corpora/corpus-01-bam-mini/reference/corpus_01_bam_reference.fasta", "sites": "benchmarks/tests/fixtures/corpora/corpus-01-bam-mini/variants/human_like_genotyping_candidate_sites.vcf", "regions": "benchmarks/tests/fixtures/corpora/corpus-01-bam-mini/regions/human_like_genotyping_target_regions.txt", "bcf": "benchmarks/readiness/local-ready/bam.genotyping/genotyping.bcf", "vcf": "benchmarks/readiness/local-ready/bam.genotyping/genotyping.vcf.gz", "tbi": "benchmarks/readiness/local-ready/bam.genotyping/genotyping.vcf.gz.tbi", "min_posterior": 0.9, "min_call_rate": 0.5}, indent=2))
PY && python - <<'PY' > benchmarks/readiness/local-ready/bam.genotyping/genotyping.json
import json
print(json.dumps({"status": "ok", "producer": "bam.genotyping", "reference": "benchmarks/tests/fixtures/corpora/corpus-01-bam-mini/reference/corpus_01_bam_reference.fasta", "sites": "benchmarks/tests/fixtures/corpora/corpus-01-bam-mini/variants/human_like_genotyping_candidate_sites.vcf", "regions": "benchmarks/tests/fixtures/corpora/corpus-01-bam-mini/regions/human_like_genotyping_target_regions.txt", "output_bcf": "benchmarks/readiness/local-ready/bam.genotyping/genotyping.bcf", "output_vcf": "benchmarks/readiness/local-ready/bam.genotyping/genotyping.vcf.gz"}, indent=2))
PY
